evidence_summary: Round132 R13 Loop-7 cross-archetype validation case for STRUCTURAL_SUCCESS_ALIGNED; this is calibration-only and does not change production scoring.
notes: HBM/memory rerating is structurally aligned, but the price path also requires 4B monitoring. Sources: round_132.md Reuters SK Hynix AI boom / market value.

evidence_summary: Round132 R13 Loop-7 cross-archetype validation case for STRUCTURAL_SUCCESS_ALIGNED; this is calibration-only and does not change production scoring.
notes: Hybrid mix and shareholder return can align, but Green still needs FCF and execution evidence. Sources: round_132.md Reuters Hyundai sales target / hybrid / buyback.

evidence_summary: Round132 R13 Loop-7 cross-archetype validation case for EVENT_TO_CONTRACT_ESCALATION; this is calibration-only and does not change production scoring.
notes: Policy is Stage 1 background; individual names require actual cancellation, returns, ROE/PBR evidence. Sources: round_132.md Reuters Korea Commercial Act revision.

evidence_summary: Round132 R13 Loop-7 cross-archetype validation case for STRUCTURAL_SUCCESS_BUT_4B_WATCH; this is calibration-only and does not change production scoring.
notes: Regulated fiat-backed stablecoin infrastructure can be a real business, but IPO rerating and rate-sensitive reserve income require 4B-watch and convertibility review. Sources: round_132.md Reuters Circle reserve income / USDC circulation.

evidence_summary: Round132 R13 Loop-7 cross-archetype validation case for DISCLOSURE_CONFIDENCE_CAPPED; this is calibration-only and does not change production scoring.
notes: An AI data-center vehicle can be Stage 1, but asset acquisition, binding tenant lease, NOI/AFFO, and power/water detail are required before Stage 3 confidence. Sources: round_132.md Reuters Blackstone data-center vehicle IPO.

company_name: Fermi AI real asset no-revenue power-campus case
evidence_summary: Round132 R13 Loop-7 cross-archetype validation case for DISCLOSURE_CONFIDENCE_CAPPED; this is calibration-only and does not change production scoring.
notes: AI real-asset demand is not Stage 3 evidence before acquired assets, binding tenants, revenue, power delivery, water, permitting, and NOI/AFFO are verified. Sources: round_132.md Reuters Fermi AI data-center IPO.

evidence_summary: Round132 R13 Loop-7 cross-archetype validation case for EVENT_TO_CONTRACT_ESCALATION; this is calibration-only and does not change production scoring.
notes: Disease, rebuild, or policy news can become Stage 2 only after funded order, budget, or guidance. Sources: round_132.md event-to-contract escalation rule.

company_name: Korea AI tax policy market shock reference
evidence_summary: Round132 R13 Loop-7 cross-archetype validation case for SECTOR_SUCCESS_BUT_POLICY_SHOCK_WATCH; this is calibration-only and does not change production scoring.
notes: Policy, tax, or redistribution comments are not company evidence, but they can break the price path of crowded AI and value-up rallies until company-level EPS/FCF impact is clarified. Sources: round_132.md Barron's Korea AI tax / KOSPI shock.

evidence_summary: Round132 R13 Loop-7 cross-archetype validation case for CIRCULAR_AI_FINANCING_WATCH; this is calibration-only and does not change production scoring.
false_positive_reason: circular_financing; supplier_investor_customer_loop; capacity_guarantee; gpu_collateral_debt; customer_concentration; refinancing_risk
notes: AI cloud contract visibility is capped when supplier, investor, customer, and capacity-guarantee relationships are circular or leverage-heavy. Sources: round_132.md Reuters Nvidia / CoreWeave financing and capacity relationship.

evidence_summary: Round132 R13 Loop-7 cross-archetype validation case for REDTEAM_ACCOUNTING_TRUST_OVERLAY; this is calibration-only and does not change production scoring.
notes: Accounting trust failure is a hard RedTeam gate even after a strong AI rerating. Sources: round_132.md AP SMCI auditor resignation.

evidence_summary: Round132 R13 Loop-7 cross-archetype validation case for OPERATIONAL_TRUST_BREAK; this is calibration-only and does not change production scoring.
notes: Security SaaS recurring revenue depends on operational trust. Sources: round_132.md Reuters CrowdStrike outage and lawsuit.

evidence_summary: Round132 R13 Loop-7 cross-archetype validation case for STABLECOIN_CONVERTIBILITY_RISK; this is calibration-only and does not change production scoring.
notes: Depeg/reserve/convertibility failure is a hard thesis break. Sources: round_132.md Reuters TerraUSD/Luna collapse.

evidence_summary: Round132 R13 Loop-7 cross-archetype validation case for COMMERCIALIZATION_FAILURE; this is calibration-only and does not change production scoring.
notes: Approval alone is not EPS/FCF; uptake, reimbursement, revenue, and cash runway must support the case. Sources: round_132.md Reuters bluebird bio cash crunch.

evidence_summary: Round132 R13 Loop-7 cross-archetype validation case for STRUCTURAL_SUCCESS_BUT_4B_WATCH; this is calibration-only and does not change production scoring.
notes: A crowded growth winner can move from 4B watch to 4C when revisions break. Sources: round_132.md Reuters Novo GLP-1 guide down.

evidence_summary: Round132 R13 Loop-7 cross-archetype validation case for AFFO_CASHFLOW_INTEGRITY_RISK; this is calibration-only and does not change production scoring.
notes: Data-center REIT candidates require AFFO, capex, funding-cost, and dividend-coverage checks. Sources: round_132.md Reuters Hindenburg Equinix short report.

evidence_summary: Round132 R13 Loop-7 cross-archetype validation case for CAPEX_AFFO_DILUTION_RISK; this is calibration-only and does not change production scoring.
notes: Data-center real-asset demand is not enough if capex growth dilutes AFFO per share or funding cost breaks dividend coverage. Sources: round_132.md Reuters Equinix capex / AFFO per share disappointment.

evidence_summary: Round132 R13 Loop-7 cross-archetype validation case for DISCLOSURE_CONFIDENCE_CAPPED; this is calibration-only and does not change production scoring.
notes: A list-only contract headline can route Layer 1, but Stage 3 is capped until detail fields such as amount, customer/use, and duration or margin are verified. Sources: round_132.md disclosure confidence cap rule.

evidence_summary: Round132 R13 Loop-7 cross-archetype validation case for PRICE_ONLY_RALLY; this is calibration-only and does not change production scoring.
notes: A price-only rally is useful for detection but cannot create Stage 3-Green. Sources: round_132.md price-only rally definition.

evidence_summary: Round132 R13 Loop-7 cross-archetype validation case for EVENT_PREMIUM; this is calibration-only and does not change production scoring.
notes: Policy, MOU, disease, disaster, or tender premium must be separated from structural EPS/FCF rerating. Sources: round_132.md event premium bucket.

evidence_summary: Round132 R13 Loop-7 cross-archetype validation case for CYCLICAL_SUCCESS; this is calibration-only and does not change production scoring.
notes: Cycle wins can be valid but should not be mislabeled as structural Green. Sources: round_132.md cyclical success rule.

evidence_summary: Round132 R13 Loop-7 cross-archetype validation case for FALSE_POSITIVE_SCORE; this is calibration-only and does not change production scoring.
notes: High score from weak proxies should be treated as calibration failure. Sources: round_132.md false-positive score rule.

evidence_summary: Round132 R13 Loop-7 cross-archetype validation case for EVIDENCE_GOOD_BUT_PRICE_FAILED; this is calibration-only and does not change production scoring.
notes: Good evidence without price-frame validation should recalibrate mispricing, not force Green. Sources: round_132.md evidence-good price-failed rule.

evidence_summary: Round132 R13 Loop-7 cross-archetype validation case for LEGAL_REGULATORY_REDTEAM; this is calibration-only and does not change production scoring.
notes: Approval, license, and legal scope must be verified before evidence supports Green. Sources: round_132.md legal/regulatory RedTeam rule.

evidence_summary: Round132 R13 Loop-7 cross-archetype validation case for LEVERAGE_FCF_BREAKDOWN; this is calibration-only and does not change production scoring.
notes: Growth does not equal E2R when FCF and refinancing capacity break. Sources: round_132.md leverage/FCF breakdown rule.

evidence_summary: Round132 R13 Loop-7 cross-archetype validation case for UNKNOWN_INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE; this is calibration-only and does not change production scoring.
notes: Unknown evidence must remain unknown; missing fields are not filled. Sources: round_132.md insufficient evidence rule.
